name: feature.code-exec.nodes
description: Sandboxed code-execution feature node pack (ADR 0114 Phase 1). The `run` node executes a code snippet in an EXTERNAL sandbox via ctx.runSandboxedCode. Capability-honest: when no sandbox adapter is wired (the default), it throws `capability_not_provided`. Action node — its output is recorded; replay/fork read the recorded result rather than re-executing.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Run Code (sandboxed)
nodes.description: Execute a code snippet in an external sandbox via ctx.runSandboxedCode. Inputs: { language, code, stdin?, timeoutMs? }. Output: { exitCode, stdout, stderr, timedOut, files }. Throws capability_not_provided when no sandbox adapter is wired (honest-off default).
